mapper.insert: insert into reports ( user_id, product_id, seller_id, reason, status ) values ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{sellerId}, #{reason}, #{status} )
mapper.select: select id, user_id, product_id, seller_id, reason, status, create_time, update_time from reports where id = #{id}

select r.id, r.user_id as userId, r.product_id as productId, r.seller_id as sellerId, r.reason, r.status, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_time as updateTime, p.name as productName, p.status as productStatus from reports r left join product p on r.product_id = p.id order by case when r.status = '待处理' then 0 else 1 end asc, r.create_time desc, r.id desc
